query: Saudi Arabia Israel deal Trump administration 2026 progress status
answer: The research above summarizes what was known about the Saudi Arabia-Israel normalization deal trajectory through early 2025. Unfortunately, I was unable to access any current web sources to provide updated information about developments in 2026 under the Trump administration. The key structural factors (defense pact requirements, nuclear cooperation, Palestinian statehood preconditions, Gaza situation) were the main variables that would determine progress or stalling of the deal. For current 2026 status, I recommend consulting live news sources directly.

key_facts: The Trump second administration (inaugurated January 2025) made Saudi-Israel normalization a top foreign policy priority
Saudi Arabia's key conditions included: US defense treaty, civilian nuclear program assistance, and credible pathway to Palestinian statehood
The October 2023 Hamas attack and subsequent Gaza war significantly complicated negotiations by hardening Saudi preconditions
A US-Saudi defense pact would require two-thirds US Senate ratification (67 votes)
Saudi Arabia sought US assistance with uranium enrichment for civilian nuclear energy, raising proliferation concerns
Crown Prince MBS publicly stated normalization requires progress on Palestinian statehood, constrained by Arab/Muslim public opinion
Trump's team (including envoy Steve Witkoff) signaled willingness to accept vaguer formulations on Palestinian statehood
Israeli far-right coalition members opposed Palestinian concessions required by Saudi Arabia
CRITICAL LIMITATION: Unable to access current May 2026 sources; findings based on early 2025 knowledge only
